response.justification: Bogdan has strong software engineering experience with distributed systems, microservices, and real-time data processing, which aligns well with the backend and architecture requirements. However, his resume lacks direct evidence of agentic AI system design, fintech-specific expertise (e.g., credit risk, working-capital management), or leadership at the executive scale required. His recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq is promising but not yet proven in a commercial, regulated fintech context.
strengths: Proven distributed-systems and event-driven architecture experience (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby)
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent frameworks and developer tooling (MCP, agentic workflows)
Strong engineering leadership and mentorship track record (e.g., workshops, CI/CD, team scaling)
concerns: No explicit experience with fintech infrastructure (credit systems, working-capital, regulatory compliance)
Limited evidence of production-grade multi-agent AI system design or operation
Lacks senior executive leadership experience (only recent Staff/Lead roles, not CTO-level)
